description: DopplerOIDCAuth configures OIDC authentication with Doppler using Kubernetes ServiceAccount tokens.

expirationSeconds.description: ExpirationSeconds sets the ServiceAccount token validity duration. Defaults to 10 minutes.

identity.description: Identity is the Doppler Service Account Identity ID configured for OIDC authentication.

serviceAccountRef.description: ServiceAccountRef specifies the Kubernetes ServiceAccount to use for authentication.
